enum_values.name: ANDMatchMode
enum_values.description: AND-match mode, SMF is set if all the unmasked bits received from the device match the corresponding bits in the match register

enum_values.name: ORMatchmode
enum_values.description: OR-match mode, SMF is set if any of the unmasked bits received from the device matches its corresponding bit in the match register

enum_values.name: Running
enum_values.description: Automatic status-polling mode is stopped only by abort or by disabling the OCTOSPI

enum_values.name: StopMatch
enum_values.description: Automatic status-polling mode stops as soon as there is a match

enum_values.name: Disabled
enum_values.description: Timeout counter is disabled, and thus the chip-select (NCS) remains active indefinitely after an access in Memory-mapped mode

enum_values.name: Enabled
enum_values.description: Timeout counter is enabled, and thus the chip-select is released in the Memory-mapped mode after TIMEOUT[15:0] cycles of external device inactivity

enum_values.name: Mode0
enum_values.description: CLK must stay low while NCS is high (chip-select released). This is referred to as Mode 0

enum_values.name: Mode3
enum_values.description: CLK must stay high while NCS is high (chip-select released). This is referred to as Mode 3

enum_values.name: MicronMode
enum_values.description: Micron mode, D0/D1 ordering in DTR 8-data-bit mode. Regular-command protocol in Single-, Dual-, Quad- and Octal-SPI modes

enum_values.name: MacronixMode
enum_values.description: Macronix mode, D1/D0 ordering in DTR 8-data-bit mode. Regular-command protocol in Single-, Dual-, Quad- and Octal-SPI modes

enum_values.name: MacronixRamMode
enum_values.description: Macronix RAM mode, D1/D0 ordering in DTR 8-data-bit mode. Regular-command protocol in Single-, Dual-, Quad- and Octal-SPI modes with dedicated address mapping

enum_values.name: HyperBusMemoryMode
enum_values.description: HyperBus memory mode, the protocol follows the HyperBus specification. 8-data-bit DTR mode must be selected

enum_values.name: HyperBusMode
enum_values.description: HyperBus register mode, addressing register space. The memory-mapped accesses in this mode must be non-cacheable, or Indirect read/write modes must be used

enum_values.name: DelayBlockEnabled
enum_values.description: The internal sampling clock (called feedback clock) or the DQS data strobe external signal is delayed by the delay block (for more details on this block, refer to the dedicated section of the reference manual as it is not part of the OCTOSPI peripheral)

enum_values.name: DelayBlockBypassed
enum_values.description: The delay block is bypassed, so the internal sampling clock or the DQS data strobe external signal is not affected by the delay block. The delay is shorter than when the delay block is not bypassed, even with the delay value set to minimum value in delay block

enum_values.name: NoWrappingSupport
enum_values.description: Wrapped reads are not supported by the memory

enum_values.name: WrappingSize16
enum_values.description: External memory supports wrap size of 16 bytes

enum_values.name: WrappingSize32
enum_values.description: External memory supports wrap size of 32 bytes

enum_values.name: WrappingSize64
enum_values.description: External memory supports wrap size of 64 bytes

enum_values.name: WrappingSize128
enum_values.description: External memory supports wrap size of 128 bytes

enum_values.name: Cleared
enum_values.description: This bit is cleared by writing 1 to CTEF

enum_values.name: InvalidAddressAccessed
enum_values.description: This bit is set in Indirect mode when an invalid address is being accessed in Indirect mode

enum_values.name: Cleared
enum_values.description: This bit is cleared by writing 1 to CTCF

enum_values.name: TransferCompleted
enum_values.description: This bit is set when the programmed number of data has been transferred

enum_values.name: Cleared
enum_values.description: It is cleared automatically as soon as the threshold condition is no longer true

enum_values.name: ThresholdReached
enum_values.description: This bit is set when the FIFO threshold has been reached

enum_values.name: Cleared
enum_values.description: It is cleared by writing 1 to CSMF

enum_values.name: Matched
enum_values.description: This bit is set in Automatic status-polling mode when the unmasked received data matches the corresponding bits in the match register (OCTOSPI_PSMAR)

enum_values.name: Cleared
enum_values.description: This bit is cleared by writing 1 to CTOF

enum_values.name: Timeout
enum_values.description: This bit is set when timeout occurs

enum_values.name: Cleared
enum_values.description: This bit is cleared automatically when the operation with the external device is finished and the FIFO is empty

enum_values.name: Busy
enum_values.description: This bit is set when an operation is ongoing

enum_values.name: Clear
enum_values.description: Writing 1 clears the TEF flag in the OCTOSPI_SR register

enum_values.name: Clear
enum_values.description: Writing 1 clears the TCF flag in the OCTOSPI_SR register

enum_values.name: Clear
enum_values.description: Writing 1 clears the SMF flag in the OCTOSPI_SR register

enum_values.name: Clear
enum_values.description: Writing 1 clears the TOF flag in the OCTOSPI_SR register

enum_values.name: Disabled
enum_values.description: DTR mode disabled for instruction phase

enum_values.name: Enabled
enum_values.description: DTR mode enabled for instruction phase

enum_values.name: Disabled
enum_values.description: DTR mode disabled for address phase

enum_values.name: Enabled
enum_values.description: DTR mode enabled for address phase

enum_values.name: SingleLine
enum_values.description: Alternate bytes on a single line

enum_values.name: Disabled
enum_values.description: DTR mode disabled for alternate bytes phase

enum_values.name: Enabled
enum_values.description: DTR mode enabled for alternate bytes phase

enum_values.name: Disabled
enum_values.description: DTR mode disabled for data phase

enum_values.name: Enabled
enum_values.description: DTR mode enabled for data phase

enum_values.name: SendOnlyFirstCmd
enum_values.description: Send instruction only for the first command

enum_values.name: Disabled
enum_values.description: DTR mode disabled for instruction phase

enum_values.name: Enabled
enum_values.description: DTR mode enabled for instruction phase

enum_values.name: Disabled
enum_values.description: DTR mode disabled for address phase

enum_values.name: Enabled
enum_values.description: DTR mode enabled for address phase

enum_values.name: SingleLine
enum_values.description: Alternate bytes on a single line

enum_values.name: Disabled
enum_values.description: DTR mode disabled for alternate bytes phase

enum_values.name: Enabled
enum_values.description: DTR mode enabled for alternate bytes phase

enum_values.name: Disabled
enum_values.description: DTR mode disabled for data phase

enum_values.name: Enabled
enum_values.description: DTR mode enabled for data phase

enum_values.name: Disabled
enum_values.description: DTR mode disabled for instruction phase

enum_values.name: Enabled
enum_values.description: DTR mode enabled for instruction phase

enum_values.name: Disabled
enum_values.description: DTR mode disabled for address phase

enum_values.name: Enabled
enum_values.description: DTR mode enabled for address phase

enum_values.name: SingleLine
enum_values.description: Alternate bytes on a single line

enum_values.name: Disabled
enum_values.description: DTR mode disabled for alternate bytes phase

enum_values.name: Enabled
enum_values.description: DTR mode enabled for alternate bytes phase

enum_values.name: Disabled
enum_values.description: DTR mode disabled for data phase

enum_values.name: Enabled
enum_values.description: DTR mode enabled for data phase
